note: Remote rule-pack feed. DeusWatch fetches this file (and the rule files it lists) from PACKS_FEED_URL so packs can be added or refreshed without upgrading the whole app. Keep every pack here curated: only rules matching fields DeusWatch populates (see sigma.FlattenEvent) - an inert rule is worse than no rule.

packs.name: WAF / Web attack essentials
packs.desc: Turns ModSecurity / OWASP CRS blocks into labeled attack alerts: SQLi, XSS, path traversal, RCE, and scanners probing known exploit paths. Needs a WAF log source (docs/modsecurity.md).
